tests.test_body:
define i32 @floor_sdiv(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @floor_sdiv(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = ashr i32 [[X:%.*]], 2
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
  %d = sdiv i32 %x, 4
  %a = and i32 %x, -2147483645
  %i = icmp ugt i32 %a, -2147483648
  %s = sext i1 %i to i32
  %r = add i32 %d, %s
  ret i32 %r
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @floor_sdiv(i32 %x) {
  %d = sdiv i32 %x, 4
  %a = and i32 %x, -2147483645
  %i = icmp ugt i32 %a, -2147483648
  %s = sext i1 %i to i32
  %r = add i32 %d, %s
  ret i32 %r
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i32 @floor_sdiv(i32 %x) {
  %d = sdiv i32 %x, 4
  %a = and i32 %x, -2147483645
  %i = icmp ugt i32 %a, -2147483648
  %s = sext i1 %i to i32
  %r = add nsw i32 %d, %s
  ret i32 %r
}

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i32> @floor_sdiv_vec_commute(<2 x i32> %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @floor_sdiv_vec_commute(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = ashr <2 x i32> [[X:%.*]], <i32 2, i32 2>
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[R]]
  %d = sdiv <2 x i32> %x, <i32 4, i32 4>
  %a = and <2 x i32> %x, <i32 -2147483645, i32 -2147483645>
  %i = icmp ugt <2 x i32> %a, <i32 -2147483648, i32 -2147483648>
  %s = sext <2 x i1> %i to <2 x i32>
  %r = add <2 x i32> %s, %d
  ret <2 x i32> %r
}

declare void @use(i8)

define i8 @floor_sdiv_uses(i8 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @floor_sdiv_uses(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[D:%.*]] = sdiv i8 [[X:%.*]], 16
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i8 [[D]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[A:%.*]] = and i8 [[X]], -113
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i8 [[A]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I:%.*]] = icmp ugt i8 [[A]], -128
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S:%.*]] = sext i1 [[I]] to i8
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i8 [[S]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = ashr i8 [[X]], 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[R]]
  %d = sdiv i8 %x, 16
  call void @use(i8 %d)
  %a = and i8 %x, -113
  call void @use(i8 %a)
  %i = icmp ugt i8 %a, -128
  %s = sext i1 %i to i8
  call void @use(i8 %s)
  %r = add i8 %d, %s
  ret i8 %r
}
tests.source_program:
declare void @use(i8)

define i8 @floor_sdiv_uses(i8 %x) {
  %d = sdiv i8 %x, 16
  call void @use(i8 %d)
  %a = and i8 %x, -113
  call void @use(i8 %a)
  %i = icmp ugt i8 %a, -128
  %s = sext i1 %i to i8
  call void @use(i8 %s)
  %r = add i8 %d, %s
  ret i8 %r
}
tests.current_optimized_program:

  %i = icmp ugt i8 %a, -128

  call void @use(i8 %s)
  %r = add nsw i8 %d, %s

  %s = sext i1 %i to i8
  call void @use(i8 %s)
  %r = ashr i8 %x, 4
  ret i8 %r
}

tests.test_body:
define i9 @sext_zext_not_commute(i4 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sext_zext_not_commute(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SX:%.*]] = sext i4 [[X:%.*]] to i9
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTX:%.*]] = xor i4 [[X]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZNOTX:%.*]] = zext i4 [[NOTX]] to i9
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = or i9 [[ZNOTX]], [[SX]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i9 [[R]]
  %sx = sext i4 %x to i9
  %notx = xor i4 %x, -1
  %znotx = zext i4 %notx to i9
  %r = add i9 %znotx, %sx
  ret i9 %r
}
tests.source_program:
define i9 @sext_zext_not_commute(i4 %x) {
  %sx = sext i4 %x to i9
  %notx = xor i4 %x, -1
  %znotx = zext i4 %notx to i9
  %r = add i9 %znotx, %sx
  ret i9 %r
}

issue.title: Missed optimization for flooring division of signed by power of two
issue.author: tspiteri

comments.author: scottmcm
comments.body:
Alive2 proof: <https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/vpidT9>

EDIT: Updated to 16-bit because the 32-bit seems to time out often, <https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/vgj3BD>

comments.author: rotateright
comments.body:
Generalized pattern and requirements:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/MJzlhl

I was hoping there was some sub-pattern we could squash within there, but I don't see it, so I'll try to add the large match.

comments.author: rotateright
comments.body:
I typo'd the bug number in the commit message, but this should be fixed with:
86b4a2355e73ff37a785aac74
